calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-11-2015 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk EBura; Proceedings not reported. (610)

Notice Of Motion To Enforce Judgment And For Contempt
Off Calendar Nov-19-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. RACHEL DOUGHTY OF THE CHANLER LAW GROUP, TEL. NO. (510) 848-8880 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. STEPHEN L. MARSH OF THE MCKENNA LONG & ALDRIDGE LLP, TEL. NO. (619)699-2418 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT BRE PARC 55 OWNER, LLC BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF WHITNEY LEEMAN'S Motion To Enforce Judgment And For Contempt - The court denies the motion to enforce judgment and for contempt as moot. Defendant made the required payment. The court denies plaintiff's request for fees. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/mjm

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Approval Of Proposition 65 Settlement And Entry Of Consent Judgment

MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Rachel Doughey, Esq., 510.848.8880, for plantiff Whitney Leeman.
Stephen Marsh, Esq., 619.699.2418, for defendants The Blackstone Group L.P., BRE Parc 55 Owner LLC, and Wyndham Worldwide Corporation.

RULING: Matter discussed. The Court grants PLAINTIFF WHITNEY LEEMAN'S Motion For Approval Of Proposition 65 Settlement And Entry Of Consent Judgment. Order signed in open court. Consent judgment signed in open court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer #5976.
